response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned video for song title/artist metadata. Found 'モエチャッカファイア' by '弍式' at 01:44 and 'G4L' by 'Giga' at 04:20. 2. Performed search with query: 'Moechakka Fire 弍式 Japanese and English lyrics' and 'G4L Giga Japanese and English lyrics'. 3. Extracted lyrics and mapped to JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by Roboco-san, with an intermission. The first song is 'Moechakka Fire' and the second is 'G4L' (performed with Omaru Polka and Shishiro Botan).

scenes.description: Roboco-san starts performing 'Moechakka Fire'. Text identifying the song and composer appears at the bottom.
scenes.song_title: モエチャッカファイア (Moechakka Fire)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ようこそお越しなさったご主人様
隣に座ってせーの
萌萌萌萌
こんなんで誰が喜ぶのさ
ねぇ教えて
笑顔でup pull, pull
愛想を忘れてご苦労様
私とあなたでせーの
Luv, luv, luv, luv
こんなんで誰が喜ぶのさ
ねぇ教えて
笑顔でup pull, pull
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Welcome, Master
Sit next to me, ready, go
Moe, moe, moe, moe
Who would be happy with this?
Hey, tell me, with a smile, up pull pull
Forget the pleasantries, good work
With you and me, ready, go
Luv, luv, luv, luv
Who would be happy with this?
Hey, tell me, with a smile, up pull pull

scenes.description: Roboco-san, Omaru Polka, and Shishiro Botan perform 'G4L'. Song title and producers appear at the bottom.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あれが正解なんて
誰の成れの果て？

答えも欲しいのも
一個てこれだけ
悩んだってしょうがないじゃんね
あれは夢だったって思うことにしたって（つら）
で...
あれが正解なんて
誰の成れの果て？
（なんだっての悶々々...）
答えも欲しいのも
一個てこれだけ
悩んだってしょうがないじゃんね
あれは夢だったって思うことにしたって（つら）
で...
Help me, follower
Just fighting
Losing to the young
Next, next
Lucky lucky and lucky!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Giga, ha)
Who says that's right?
Whose shadow of their former self?
(What the hell?)
I just want an answer
There's no point worrying, you know
I decided to think it was just a dream (Pain)
Then...
That's the reason
Whose end is it?
Everything is so vague
I want answers too
Just this much
Even if I worry
It can't be helped
I tried to think it was just a dream (Pain)
But I can't feel it at all
Help me, follower
Just fighting
Losing to the young
Next, next
Lucky lucky and lucky!
